response.justification: The candidate far exceeds the 6+ year requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack work, including recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product development, AWS and Kubernetes deployment experience, MongoDB/MySQL, and a demonstrated testing craftsmanship culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, workshops). Critically, his current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the rarest requirement in this JD. Gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python experience, but his breadth across languages and frameworks suggests these are learnable quickly.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and MongoDB work
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing expertise: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and instructor of testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not evidenced, and Java exposure appears limited and dated
Several years invested in the niche D-language ecosystem and Ember.js rather than the React-centric stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling development
Missing Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python from required stack
